<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before and after to see what changed

after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after.segmentation['nodes']}

for n in before.segmentation['nodes']:

        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check the ascii around the trail area
print("\n=== Trail area (rows 37-40, cols 10-30) ===")
lines = after.ascii.split('\n')
for r in range(37, 41):
    print(f"Row {r}: {lines[r][10:30]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

# Check trail area after UP
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\n=== Trail objects after UP ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['w', 'g'] and n['pixels'] <= 4 and n['boundary'][0][0] >= 35 and n['boundary'][0][0] < 50:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check ascii around upper trail area
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Area rows 28-41, cols 10-30 ===")
for r in range(28, 42):
    print(f"Row {r}: {lines[r][10:30]}")
